block_01: Your opinion is highly important to us. It’s not than just words, because we actually use client feedback to improve our products and services.
block_02: For example, our latest survey revealed that a large number of clients did not approve of the high commissions on Crypto. That feedback prompted us to cut our commission on Crypto by half.
block_03: Please, take a moment to answer a couple of questions to help us further improve.
block_05: It will take no longer than 1-2 minutes
